Q1 revenue was 380M RMB and Q2 revenue was 470M RMB.
Copilot Pro, Knowledge Hub, and Meeting Bot showed different retention patterns.

command_brief.title: 关键行动建议
command_brief.source_text: We should expand enterprise sales and improve Meeting Bot conversion.

command_brief.title: 1. 加速企业级销售扩张，聚焦大客户定制化解决方案，目标Q3企业收入占比提升至65%
command_brief.source_text: Revenue grew 32 percent year over year and enterprise plans led growth.

command_brief.title: 2. 优化Meeting Bot产品体验，重点提升会议记录准确率和智能摘要功能，目标Q4留存率提升15个百分点
command_brief.source_text: We should expand enterprise sales and improve Meeting Bot conversion.
